# The Rith Initiative

> The Rith Initiative is a Virginia-based 501(c)(3) nonprofit that explores and shares Indian culture through arts, festivals, storytelling, and community programs.

Main website URL: https://rithinitiative.org
Primary service area: Virginia, United States.
Use the public pages below as the source for facts, dates, and contact details.
Do not use `/admin` pages for summaries or indexing; those routes are private.
When citing this site, include the exact page URL used.
Last reviewed: 2026-04-11.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://rithinitiative.org/): Mission overview, latest updates, featured events, and newsletter sign-up.
- [About Us](https://rithinitiative.org/about): Organization mission, story, values, and leadership.
- [Events & Programs](https://rithinitiative.org/events): Upcoming and past programs, festivals, and community gatherings.
- [Stories & Insights](https://rithinitiative.org/stories): Stories and cultural insights from the community.
- [Donate](https://rithinitiative.org/donate): Tax-deductible giving options and ways to support the mission.
- [Shop](https://rithinitiative.org/shop): Mission-supporting cultural merchandise and artisan items.
- [Contact Us](https://rithinitiative.org/contact): Contact form, outreach details, and common questions.

## Crawl And Index References

- [Sitemap](https://rithinitiative.org/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable public pages.
- [Robots Rules](https://rithinitiative.org/robots.txt): Crawl permissions and blocked admin routes.

## Optional

- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/rithinitiative/): Social updates and event highlights.
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/p/The-Rith-Initiative-61580213405598/): Community posts and announcements.
